textByHashes.5fe06d41050302da10792a50baaccc961fe26bf3: There can't be any secret offices here. I'd have noticed. I notice lots of things, you know.
textByHashes.b8e7cdc9f8e3835d0f9e0af44a3de467cb298756: He sometimes comes to inspect the wine barrels. I like to inspect them myself sometimes.
textByHashes.f201f4ae0483b5a89106b1626e4076dd0ddcfe32: What? Everyone knows who I am. I'm Pandur Hosidius, son of Lord Kandur Hosidius. You know him? The man who owns all this land? Well I'm his son.
textByHashes.74de989b3f1407152dd4a89a0f8a47418f7ba915: This is our vinery. My father's cracked the secret of viticulture, and although our climate's too cold for most grapes, we've made a working vineyard here.
textByHashes.8fbb9b97b246eba816a84245a81ab1160bf95155: You seem to have got yourself a decent reputation around here, so you can grow grapes if you like. Old Gallow will look after them for you.
textByHashes.6ff21c51228fab47d785f6ad0e56e8cbe72a5d70: Don't get any ideas, though. We're not having just any random stranger wander in off the fields and try to grow grapes.
textByHashes.742a71920ce8870b379b9c2ad85eea372d5b5316: I've got to test the produce. Ever since I was a child, I've been the official tester for the bacon, the beef, the pies, the beer, everything. Now there's wine!
